arts.ttl: Everton scout at Europa League clash – Striker and youngster stand out in 1-0 win
arts.sum: Everton were one of the sides with a scout in attendance to watch Porto take on Olympiacos in the Europa League this week. That’s according to Record, who say Everton were among a host of clubs across Europe to have an ‘emissary’ at Dragão for the game.
